heading: This Afternoon
text: Mostly sunny south, partly cloudy north. Highs in mid to upper 80s. Winds variable to southwest at around 5 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Clear to partly cloudy. Lows in the low to mid 60s, some upper 60s in the broad valleys west. Winds becoming light and variable, except from the southwest 5 to 10 mph in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys.

heading: Thursday
text: Mostly to partly sunny, except becoming mostly cloudy in the afternoon near the international border. Slight chance of an afternoon shower or thunderstorm south of Route 4, chance to the north, except becoming likely late, near and north of Route 2. Highs from the mid 80s to around 90, some lower 80s far north. Southwest winds 5 to 10 mph.
